REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-22-2020 IN DEPT. 505 - JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF JOHN A. KITHAS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT 777 PLUMBING, INC. FOR $28,713.16 COMPRISED OF PRINCIPAL SUM OF $22,514.08 AND PREJUDGMENT INTEREST AT 10 PERCENT PER ANNUM FROM SEPTEMBER 21, 2017 IN THE SUM OF $6,182.078 PLUS ANY RECOVERABLE COSTS. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT JORGE SANCHEZ AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF JOHN A. KITHAS. MR. SANCHEZ ALSO TO RECOVER ANY RECOVERABLE COSTS. THE LEGAL SERVICES PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF WAS PROVIDED TO 777 PLUMBING, INC., NOT MR. SANCHEZ. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED; JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY. (HK/505).
